resultList.dtldesc: Step into a world of modern living with this beautifully crafted 3 BHK Flat for sale in the serene locality of Kalavakkam, Chennai. Designed with meticulous attention to detail, this flat offers spacious interiors with an open-plan layout, allowing natural light to illuminate every corner. ::::::::::::Embrace a life of comfort, convenience, and tranquillity in this beautiful 3 BHK flat in Kalavakkam, Chennai. Perfect for families, it offers everything you need for a fulfilling lifestyle in a vibrant community.::::::::::::Property Specifications ::::::::::::Facing the north-west direction, this 100% Vastu-Shastra-friendly property brings in positive energy and good vibes. Spanning a generous super built-up area of 1077 sq ft, this unfurnished flat is situated on the 3rd floor of a 13-story building. Featuring well-ventilated and naturally bright spaces to dwell in, this flat is ready with vitrified tiles which have low maintenance costs. Speaking about the floor plan, there is a lavish living and dining area and 3 beautiful bedrooms for you to relax.::::::::::::Additionally, there are 2 western bathrooms of which one bathroom is attached to the bedroom and the other is available for common use.  You can view the road and the open area from the balcony which opens from the living area inviting plenty of natural light. The kitchen is designed for efficiency and decked with a granite platform, a stainless steel sink, and an attached utility space to accommodate your storage needs.::::::::::::Facilities ::::::::::::The property comes with a wide range of amenities that cater to every family member's needs. It offers open parking, 24-hour water supply, and 100% power backup to ensure uninterrupted living. Security is a priority, with a dedicated security guard, CCTV surveillance, and two elevators for easy access. For recreational activities, the building includes a gym, a kids' play area, a swimming pool, a clubhouse, and a park, ensuring a healthy and enjoyable lifestyle.::::::::::::Locality ::::::::::::Situated in the thriving locality of Kalavakkam, the flat is part of the esteemed Marg Pushpadruma complex, known for its serene environment and well-planned infrastructure. Essential amenities are within easy reach, including several esteemed schools, well-known hospitals, prestigious shopping malls, and supermarkets, all located within 1 to 2 km. ::::::::::::Public transport options like buses, cabs, taxis, and autos are readily available, and the Bypass Road is just 100 meters away, offering seamless connectivity to the rest of Chennai. Banks and ATM centers are conveniently located within 500 meters, adding to the comfort and ease of daily living.
